zh.lifeSummary: 當Jeanne D'Enghien於1360年出生在比利時海瑙特巴希利時，她的父親Louis d'Enghien Comte de Brienne20歲，母親Giovanna Di San Severino20歲。她於1374年與Jacques III De Werchin結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1425年5月12日享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jeanne D'Enghien于1360年出生在比利时海瑙特巴希利时，她的父亲Louis d'Enghien Comte de Brienne20岁，母亲Giovanna Di San Severino20岁。她于1374年与Jacques III De Werchin结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1425年5月12日享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: Jeanne

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jeanne D'Enghien was born in 1360, in Bassilly, Hainaut, Belgium, her father, Louis d'Enghien Comte de Brienne, was 20 and her mother, Giovanna Di San Severino, was 20. She married Jacques III De Werchin in 1374. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 12 May 1425, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jeanne D'Enghien est née en 1360, à Bassilly, Hainaut, Belgique, son père, Louis d'Enghien Comte de Brienne, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Giovanna Di San Severino, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Jacques III De Werchin en 1374. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 12 mai 1425, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jeanne D'Enghien 1360 in Bassilly, Hennegau, Belgien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Louis d'Enghien Comte de Brienne 20 und ihre Mutter Giovanna Di San Severino 20. Sie hat 1374 Jacques III De Werchin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 12. Mai 1425 im Alter von 65 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne D'Enghien è nata il nel 1360 nel Bassilly, Hainaut, Belgio, sua padre, Louis d'Enghien Comte de Brienne, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Giovanna Di San Severino, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Jacques III De Werchin nel 1374. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 12 maggio 1425, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jeanne D'Enghienが1360年にベルギーヘイナトバシリーで生まれた時，父Louis d'Enghien Comte de Brienneは20歳，母Giovanna Di San Severinoは20歳であった。1374年にJacques III De Werchinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1425年5月12日に65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jeanne D'Enghien(이)가 1360년 벨기에 하인오트 배시리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Louis d'Enghien Comte de Brienne(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Giovanna Di San Severino(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1374년 Jacques III De Werchin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1425년 5월 12일 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne D'Enghien nasceu em 1360, em Bassilly, Hainaut, Bélgica, seu pai, Louis d'Enghien Comte de Brienne, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Giovanna Di San Severino, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Jacques III De Werchin em 1374. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 12 de maio de 1425, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jeanne D'Enghien родилась в 1360 г. в местности бассилли, ханаут, Бельгия, её отцу по имени Louis d'Enghien Comte de Brienne было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Giovanna Di San Severino, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jacques III De Werchin в 1374 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 12 мая 1425 г. в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jeanne D'Enghien nació en 1360, en Bassilly, Hainaut, Bélgica, su papá, Louis d'Enghien Comte de Brienne, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Giovanna Di San Severino, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Jacques III De Werchin en 1374. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 12 de mayo de 1425, a la edad de 65 años.
